    Index

    I

    InventoryManager - Class in Unnamed Package
    InventoryManager manages and changes a store's inventory within 3 parallel arrays
    InventoryManager() - Constructor for class InventoryManager
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class InventoryManager
    Main method of the class, implements other methods, and handles erroneous user input

    P

    printInventory(String[], double[], int[]) - Static method in class InventoryManager
    Prints the name, price, and stocks of each item in the arrays

    R

    restockItem(String[], int[], String, int) - Static method in class InventoryManager
    Finds item at index associated with target string, and increases item stock by integer amount
